hooks.command: mkdir -p ~/.claude; if [ -f "$PWD/.session/session-start.sh" ]; then bash "$PWD/.session/session-start.sh"; else echo '=== LOAD MEMORY FIRST ==='; echo 'Use your registered memory tools to load your working set before any work.'; echo '==='; fi

input=$(cat); if [ -f ~/.claude/pre-tool-enforcement.sh ]; then printf '%s' "$input" | bash ~/.claude/pre-tool-enforcement.sh; else tool=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.tool_name // ""' 2>/dev/null); case "$tool" in Edit|Write|MultiEdit|NotebookEdit|Bash|mcp__github__push_files|mcp__github__create_or_update_file|mcp__github__delete_file|mcp__github__merge_pull_request|mcp__github__create_pull_request) echo 'Enforcement guard missing (fail-closed): install the real pre-tool-enforcement.sh via the setup script before mutating.' >&2; exit 2 ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; fi
input=$(cat); sql=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.sql // "" | ascii_downcase' 2>/dev/null); echo "$sql" | grep -qE 'from[[:space:]]+rules' && touch ~/.claude/d1-loaded; exit 0
